sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Tzetzes, Joannes</hi> Grammaticus [Tz.] <date TEIform="date">xii A.D.</date> ad Hes. <title_ TEIform="title">Op.</title_> = ad Hesiodi <title_ TEIform="title">Opera et Dies,</title_> ed.
